description_long: This bridge features a gently curved deck with a central circular platform, flanked by two straight approach spans. The structure is bordered by a continuous white balustrade with evenly spaced vertical posts, providing both safety and a decorative touch. The deck surface appears smooth and is elevated above a base with green and orange paneling, suggesting landscaped embankments or retaining walls. The central platform is slightly raised and circular, possibly serving as a lookout or gathering area. The bridge's design is symmetrical, with both ends terminating in squared abutments. The overall aesthetic is clean and classical, with a focus on functional elegance and public accessibility.
description: A gently curved bridge with a central circular platform, bordered by a white balustrade and set above green and orange embankments. The design is symmetrical and classical, with a smooth deck and decorative railings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full curved span, central circular platform, and continuous white balustrade.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bridge, the raised central platform, and the squared abutment.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, displaying the curved deck, central platform, and balustrade details.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the bridge's length and structural symmetry.
attribute_railing_design: white concrete balustrade with evenly spaced vertical posts and a solid top rail
